title: spergularia marina var. heterosperma
intro: Spergularia marina var. heterosperma, also known as the coastal sand-spurrey, is a variety of plant in the Caryophyllaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Spergularia marina var. heterosperma include treating digestive issues, wound healing, and skin conditions, as well as providing antioxidant and immune-boosting effects. Herbal preparations of Spergularia marina var. heterosperma are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or using them in a tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
